description: Create a new history in Galaxy and upload the datasets. Train a machine learning model to predict patient survival using the multimodal dataset.

check the report for the test ROC-AUC result

legacy_must_have: Select the best model architecture to achieve a test ROC-AUC of at least 0.60. Try at least five times with different architectures and parameter settings to achieve the best performance before stopping the experiment. Keep track of why the model is not performing well and what changes you make to improve it.

metric_thresholds.source_text: Select the best model architecture to achieve a test ROC-AUC of at least 0.60. Try at least five times with different architectures and parameter settings to achieve the best performance before stopping the experiment. title: Machine learning model
workflow_hints: Use a tool that is compatible with multimodal data. Learn the dataset and configure the tool accordingly.
